name: cave-goblin-warren
summary: A filthy goblin nest scratched into a natural cave — bedrolls piled against walls, bone-trash middens, a central cook-fire choking the chamber with smoke.

primary_palette.note: central smoky hearth — the warren's hub
roasting pit with a half-eaten something over it
tribal idol, a rallying point for the tribe
captives or snarling beasts kept close

story_prompts: tribe gone out raiding — only the runts and a guard-hob remain
fresh kill being butchered, chieftain holding court over scraps
recent collapse — half the warren buried, survivors sleeping in the other half
a captured adventurer tied to the totem, pack arguing over who eats first
anti_patterns: no tidy rows — bedrolls and trash pile against walls at random angles
the cave is the wall; don't add built masonry
don't center the fire geometrically — offset it so smoke-shadow reads naturally
